obligations.nl_gloss: Weights and values are aligned by length.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat), ∃ (sel : Selection), ValidSelection ws sel ∧ totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap ∧ totalValue vs sel = knapsack01 ws vs cap
obligations.nl_gloss: There exists a valid, feasible selection whose total value equals the returned result.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat) (sel : Selection), ValidSelection ws sel → totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap → totalValue vs sel ≤ knapsack01 ws vs cap
obligations.nl_gloss: No valid feasible selection beats the returned result.
